title: xanthocephalum texanum
intro: Xanthocephalum texanum, also known as yellow toadflax or Texas yellow toadflax, is a perennial plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The medicinal properties of this plant include its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Xanthocephalum texanum include relieving respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing inflammation and pain associated with arthritis and other conditions. Herbal preparations of Xanthocephalum texanum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are typically used under the guidance of a healthcare professional.
